findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat parse (health, GI, anomalies, EVE tension)
findings.detail: Reviewed 20260324T205045Z.json: health=stressed, gi=0.74 mode=yellow, anomalies=2, eve.global_tension=high. Fields are internally consistent.

Live response shows the same two elevated anomalies: GAIA/USGS Earthquake (max M7.5 Alaska, 34 quakes M2.5+) and DAEDALUS-µ/Self-ping HTTP 401. Composite 0.686 vs heartbeat 0.683 — within drift. Both anomalies are persistent at verification time (not transient).
Both anomalies remain severity=elevated; no additional anomalies vs heartbeat. Stable, not escalating.

source=live (not mock). global_integrity=0.74 mode=yellow, terminal_status=stressed, primary_driver=Moderate signal degradation — consistent with composite ~0.69 and low freshness/information scores (0.3 each).

signals.freshness=0.3 and signals.information=0.3. Micro agents report upstream failures: HERMES-µ Wikipedia API fetch failed; THEMIS data.gov API fetch failed. Explains degraded freshness independent of GI mock vs live.

findings.check: Vercel deployment health (READY, ERROR in 6h, ignoreCommand/bot commits)
findings.detail: Vercel CLI (npx vercel) has no credentials in this environment (VERCEL_TOKEN unset; CLI attempted interactive device login). Production HTTPS endpoints respond 200, but deployment state, recent ERROR builds, and ignoreCommand behavior could not be verified via API.

findings.check: EVE /api/eve/global-news cross-check vs GI and anomalies
findings.detail: global_tension=high with dominant_category=geopolitical. GI is yellow/stressed (not green), so no disconnect of the form high tension + green GI. Seismic and self-ping issues do not correlate with EVE headline themes (feed is dated 2022 sample items); tension reflects feed severity mix, while anomalies are environmental + auth/infra.

eve_correlation: High global_tension coexists with yellow GI and stressed terminal — aligned. Persistent anomalies map to real-world seismic activity and expected 401 on self-ping, not to EVE item text; partial disconnect is stale/curated EVE timestamps vs live signals, not GI logic.
recommendation: Treat stressed/yellow state as confirmed until upstream feeds (Wikipedia, data.gov) recover and self-ping auth is reviewed if 401 is unintended. Provide non-interactive Vercel read credentials or document deployment checks in a trusted environment so ZEUS can validate READY/ERROR/ignoreCommand. Optionally refresh EVE cache for recency parity with other agents.
